day1_after_start.name: Me
day1_after_start.text: *Last class is done. The bell rings and everyone rushes to their feet.*

day1_after_start_2.name: Me
day1_after_start_2.text: *Pretty long for a first day. But not bad.*

day1_after_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea invited me to hang out in the student council room
Stop by the library and see Yuna again
Riin-sensei in the nurse's office is for some reason on my mind
Go say hi to Eunsu-sensei in the teachers' office

day1_after_sea.name: Me
day1_after_sea.text: *The student council room at the far end of the second floor. A small sign reading 'Student Council' hangs on the door.*

day1_after_sea_3.name: Me
day1_after_sea_3.text: *I open the door. It's a small room. Two desks, a locker, one potted plant by the window. Everything tidy.*

day1_after_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_4.text: "You came! This is the student council room. Pretty cramped, right? But it's quiet and I like it."

day1_after_sea_5.name: Me
day1_after_sea_5.text: "Oh, it's cozy. Not bad at all."

day1_after_sea_6.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_6.text: "Sit down. Want something to drink? There's stuff in the fridge."

day1_after_sea_7.name: Me
day1_after_sea_7.text: "The student council room has a fridge?"

day1_after_sea_8.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_8.text: "Class president perks~ Just kidding. The seniors left it behind last year."

day1_after_sea_9.name: Me
day1_after_sea_9.text: *Sea hands me a canned drink. Natural, like she's done this a hundred times.*

day1_after_sea_10.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_10.text: "{name}, it was your first day today... was it rough?"

day1_after_sea_11.name: Me
day1_after_sea_11.text: "No, I think I settled in well — thanks to you, honestly."

day1_after_sea_14.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_14.text: "It's always hard at first when you transfer. You don't know anyone at all."

day1_after_sea_15.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_15.text: "...I'm happy {name} came. It gets a little lonely being in the student council room alone."

day1_after_sea_16.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_16.text: "Well, now that {name} is here, I guess that's sorted."

day1_after_sea_17.name: Me
day1_after_sea_17.text: *She grins playfully. She's a good person. Glad the class president is like this.*

day1_after_sea_21.name: Me
day1_after_sea_21.text: *Sea held out her pinky. ...We're not in elementary school. But I couldn't say no.*

day1_after_yuna.name: Me
day1_after_yuna.text: *I go to the library and Yuna is already there. She's sorting through photos by the window.*

day1_after_yuna_4.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_4.text: "This is kind of my secret spot. Sit down, right here beside me."

day1_after_yuna_5.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_5.text: *I sit next to Yuna. Photos are up on her camera screen.*

day1_after_yuna_6.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_6.text: "I have something to show you. These are photos I've taken."

day1_after_yuna_7.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_7.text: *Yuna flips through the camera and shows me. School scenery. The schoolyard in full bloom. A cat sitting on the bench by the gym. The track field at sunset.*

day1_after_yuna_8.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_8.text: "You took all of these? They're really good."

day1_after_yuna_11.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_11.text: *We chat about the cat for a long time. Yuna is shy, but when she talks about something she loves, her eyes sparkle.*

day1_after_yuna_12.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_12.text: *I keep scrolling through the photos... and then one comes up that's different in feel. A dark hallway ending. A closed door. Low lighting, an unsettling atmosphere.*

day1_after_yuna_14.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_14.text: *Just as I'm about to ask, Yuna quickly closes the camera.*

day1_after_yuna_15.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_15.text: "Oh, that's just... an accident. I'll delete it."

day1_after_yuna_16.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_16.text: "Senpai, I'll show you better ones next time. I'll take nicer photos!"

day1_after_yuna_17.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_17.text: *Yuna smiles brightly. ...That photo is still on my mind. But photography students shoot all kinds of things. Probably nothing.*

day1_after_riin.name: Me
day1_after_riin.text: *I open the nurse's office door. Riin-sensei is at her desk, reading something.*

day1_after_riin_3.name: Me
day1_after_riin_3.text: *Riin-sensei takes off her glasses and smiles.*

day1_after_riin_4.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_4.text: "Still not feeling well, or just stopping by?"

day1_after_riin_6.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_6.text: "I'm joking. Come on in. I'll make you some tea."

day1_after_riin_7.name: Me
day1_after_riin_7.text: *Riin-sensei fills the electric kettle. She takes out a herbal tea bag from a drawer.*

day1_after_riin_8.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_8.text: "Is herbal tea okay? It's chamomile. Good for helping you relax."

day1_after_riin_9.name: Me
day1_after_riin_9.text: *I take the warm cup. The herb scent is nice. The nurse's office feels cozy.*

day1_after_riin_12.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_12.text: "Good. Just nerves from the first day. It'll get easier from tomorrow."

day1_after_riin_13.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_13.text: "What was your old school like? Was it fun?"

day1_after_riin_14.name: Kang Riin
day1_after_riin_14.text: "You'll settle in fast here too. I'll keep an eye on you."

day1_after_riin_15.name: Me
day1_after_riin_15.text: *Riin-sensei refills my cup with a smile. A warm, peaceful time. It's reassuring to have a teacher like her.*

day1_after_eunsu.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu.text: *I knock on the teachers' office door.*

day1_after_eunsu_3.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_3.text: *I open the door. Eunsu-sensei is sorting through papers at the desk. She looks up, surprised.*

day1_after_eunsu_4.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_4.text: "{name}? You came by in person after school? That's sweet of you."

day1_after_eunsu_5.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_5.text: "I wanted to come say hello on my first day."

day1_after_eunsu_6.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_6.text: "How thoughtful. Sit down. Would you like coffee?"

day1_after_eunsu_7.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_7.text: "I was going to make some for myself anyway — no trouble at all."

day1_after_eunsu_8.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_8.text: *Eunsu-sensei brews coffee. The teachers' office fills with the aroma.*

day1_after_eunsu_9.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_9.text: "How was today? Could you keep up with the lessons?"

day1_after_eunsu_10.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_10.text: "Did you make any friends? Was Sea taking care of you?"

day1_after_eunsu_11.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_11.text: "...{name}, was there anything going on at your previous school? Your transfer reason seemed a bit... unusual."

day1_after_eunsu_13.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_13.text: "Oh, no. I was just asking out of curiosity. No particular reason."

day1_after_eunsu_14.name: Park Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_14.text: "I hope you make plenty of good memories here. I'll be here to help."

day1_after_eunsu_15.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_15.text: *She's warm. I'm in a good mood leaving the teachers' office.*

day1_after_home.name: Me
day1_after_home.text: *I step out through the school gate and glance back.*

day1_after_home_2.name: Me
day1_after_home_2.text: *Not bad for a first day. There are a lot of good people here.*

day1_after_home_3.name: Me
day1_after_home_3.text: *Sea looked after me at every turn, Eunsu-sensei was warm, Riin-sensei was kind.*

day1_after_home_4.name: Me
day1_after_home_4.text: *...Someone seems to be looking down at me from a third-floor window.*

day1_after_home_5.name: Me
day1_after_home_5.text: *The backlight makes their face invisible. Just a silhouette.*

day1_after_home_6.name: Me
day1_after_home_6.text: *...That window is our classroom. From that spot... the rear window seat. Right next to Seolhwa's seat.*

day1_after_home_8.name: Me
day1_after_home_8.text: *...Maybe it's just the sunlight messing with me. Or maybe someone's on cleaning duty. I turn and start walking. Let's go home.*
